title: Ram Mandir
tagline: Ram Mandir — spiritual town of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: The Ram Mandir (ISO: Rāma Maṁdira, lit.
overview.description: The Ram Mandir (ISO: Rāma Maṁdira, lit. 'Rama Temple'), is a Hindu temple complex in Ayodhya, Uttar Pradesh, India. Many Hindus believe that it is located at the site of Ram Janmabhoomi, the mythical birthplace of Rama, a principal deity of Hinduism. The site of the temple has been the subject of communal tensions between Hindus and Muslims, as it is the former location of the Babri Masjid, a mosque built around 1529. In the 1850s, the British erected a fence, and Hindus were allowed to worship in the outer courtyard.

topPlaces.name: Ram Mandir Dhwajarohan
topPlaces.description: Ram Mandir Dhwajarohan (Devanagari: राम मंदिर ध्वजारोहण) or Ram Mandir Flag Hoisting was the ceremonial raising of the sacred flag (Dharma Dhwaj) on November 25, 2025, atop the 161-foot (49 m) gold-plated spire of the Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Mandir. The temple is situated on the banks of the Sarayu River in Ayodhya, Uttar Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Babri Masjid
topPlaces.description: The Babri Masjid (ISO: Bābarī Masjida; meaning Mosque of Babur) was a mosque located in Ayodhya, in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India. Many Hindus believe that the location where it stood is the site of Ram Janmabhoomi, the mythical birthplace of Rama, a principal deity of Hinduism.

topPlaces.name: Kanak Bhawan
topPlaces.description: Kanak Bhawan (lit. 'Golden Palace') is a temple in Ram Janmabhoomi, Ayodhya, which is in the north-east of Ramkot. It is one of the most famous temples of Ayodhya.

topPlaces.name: Ayodhya
topPlaces.description: Ayodhya (Hindi: Ayodhyā, pronounced [ɐˈjoːd̪ʱjɐː] ) is a city situated on the banks of the Sarayu river in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. It is the administrative headquarters of the Ayodhya district as well as the Ayodhya division of Uttar Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Gulab Bari
topPlaces.description: Gulab Bari (lit. 'Garden of Roses') is the Tomb of Nawab Shuja-ud-Daula, located in Faizabad, Ayodhya district of Uttar Pradesh, India. This place has a good collection of roses of various varieties set by the sides of water fountains.

topPlaces.name: Darshan Nagar
topPlaces.description: Darshan Nagar is a town in the Ayodhya district, Uttar Pradesh state in India. Darshan Nagar town is 5 kilometres (3.1 mi) south of the city of Ayodhya.

topPlaces.name: Sri Ram Chandra Singh Mahavidyalaya
topPlaces.description: Sri Ram Chandra Singh Mahavidyalaya (SRCSM) college is situated at Lohati Saraiya in Ayodhya district, Uttar Pradesh. The college is affiliated to Dr.

topPlaces.name: Rikabganj
topPlaces.description: Rikabganj is a Suburb located in Ayodhya city in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh and is sub post office of Ayodhya.

The temple is situated on the banks of the Sarayu River in Ayodhya, Uttar Pradesh, India.

The Babri Masjid (ISO: Bābarī Masjida; meaning Mosque of Babur) was a mosque located in Ayodhya, in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India. Many Hindus believe that the location where it stood is the site of Ram Janmabhoomi, the mythical birthplace of Rama, a principal deity of Hinduism.
Kanak Bhawan (lit. 'Golden Palace') is a temple in Ram Janmabhoomi, Ayodhya, which is in the north-east of Ramkot. It is one of the most famous temples of Ayodhya.

Ayodhya (Hindi: Ayodhyā, pronounced [ɐˈjoːd̪ʱjɐː] ) is a city situated on the banks of the Sarayu river in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. It is the administrative headquarters of the Ayodhya district as well as the Ayodhya division of Uttar Pradesh, India.

Gulab Bari (lit. 'Garden of Roses') is the Tomb of Nawab Shuja-ud-Daula, located in Faizabad, Ayodhya district of Uttar Pradesh, India. This place has a good collection of roses of various varieties set by the sides of water fountains.
Darshan Nagar is a town in the Ayodhya district, Uttar Pradesh state in India. Darshan Nagar town is 5 kilometres (3.1 mi) south of the city of Ayodhya.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ram Mandir?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ram Mandir is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ram Mandir?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chaudhary Charan Singh International Airport, Lucknow (130 km) and the nearest railway station is Gorakhpur Junction (117 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ram Mandir?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ram Mandir at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ram Mandir?
faq.a: Stays in Ram Mandir start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ram Mandir?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ram Mandir Dhwajarohan, Babri Masjid, Kanak Bhawan, Ayodhya, Gulab Bari.
